title: Chat +
description: Adds tiny icons to chat messages
body:
![Chat + Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/681bd7171104d28a6362cf2f064fb39fafac5ad7.png)
![Chat Plus Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c4ed2315732500cd2fcae6cfb0cb0fff96a8f1a_0.webp)

[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/chatplus)[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chat+)[![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/FgypubrVmn)

***

### **📋 About**

Chat + is a resource pack that adds little colorful icons to every chat message. This can make the chat more visually appealing and help players quickly identify different types of messages.

The pack makes use of Custom Unicode Characters and Minecraft language files to add said icons, and is mostly available for every language.

**❗IMPORTANT: This pack only works in Singleplayer and on Vanilla Servers or servers with Vanilla message output**

***

<details>
<summary>📄 Terms of Use</summary>
You can:

✅-Use it on a server (in game download!) or in mod packs

✅-Use and edit it for YouTube videos and Content Creator edits (Linking back preferably but not needed)

You cannot:

❌-Redistribute edited or unedited assets as is

❌-Re-upload the pack
</details>
